Assertions changed but no test was deleted. Read the note, open the GitHub diff if you want the lines, and judge whether any check got weaker — no verdict is applied.

tests/companion-reset.test.js

assertions changed view diff on GitHub ↗
↳ Not a weakening — assertion count is unchanged (10→10). The 4 changed assert lines only update the expected Reset-button label from 'Reset progress'/'Reset progress?' to the new '↻ Reset'/'↻ Reset?' in both the video and audio cases, matching this PR's label change. Same two-tap-arms-then-resets behaviour is still fully asserted.
